§6Cadmium Steel§f

§aThe reliable substitute for technetium steel — interchangeable in almost every recipe!§f

§bCadmium Steel§f is an alloy made from cadmium and steel. It serves as a §efully interchangeable substitute§f for technetium steel in §ealmost all§f recipes, giving you an alternative path to advanced materials when technetium is scarce.

§6Production§f (Blast Furnace or Crucible):
§b• 1×§f Steel Ingot + §e1×§f Cadmium Nugget → §e1×§f Cadmium Steel Ingot
§b• Or Crucible: §e8×§f Cd Nuggets + §e1×§f Steel Ingot

§6Key Uses§f:
§b• Reactor Remote Control Block§f — essential for reactor automation
§b• Moderated RBMK Fuel Rods§f — safer RBMK operation
§b• Gas Centrifuge Overclock Upgrade§f — faster isotope separation
§b• Magnetic Extractor§f — ore processing
§b• Reinforced Block of Niter§f — explosive containment

§eNote§f: Since cadmium steel and technetium steel are interchangeable, you can choose whichever path is easier for your resource situation. Technetium steel comes from waste reprocessing (passive), while cadmium steel requires active farming (mustard willow cultivation) but can be automated!

§6Bobmazon§f: Cadmium steel also contributes to §eBobmazon§f progression.
